criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads from app stores.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalized recommendations, search, and user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech reviews, design awards

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and innovation of features offered.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Level of security and privacy features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, security reviews, privacy policies
